title: zygogynum tieghemii
intro: Zygogynum tieghemii, also known as the New Caledonian cherry, is a plant species belonging to the family Hernandiaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Zygogynum tieghemii are attributed to its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, cough, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant, which include infusions and decoctions, are used to harness its medicinal properties.
